name: rename_a_conversation
description: Renames a slack channel, automatically adjusting the new name to meet naming conventions (e.g., converting to lowercase), which may affect integrations using the old name.

name.description:
New name for the conversation. Must be 80 characters or less and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
Example: "new-channel-name"

channel.description:
ID of the conversation (channel) to rename.
Example: "C012AB3CD"
